title: Full Stack Engineer - PHP
description: Senior PHP Backend Engineer (AI-Native Software Development) About MessageGate MessageGate is an AI-first customer engagement platform helping brands build intelligent experiences across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook Messenger, TikTok, Web Chat, and emerging conversational channels. Trusted by global brands including Turkish Airlines, L'Oréal, Vodafone, Coca-Cola, Disney, and Unilever, we combine messaging, automation, AI agents, and customer data into a single platform. As we expand our AI and agentic product portfolio, we're looking for experienced engineers who combine strong software engineering fundamentals with modern AI-powered development practices. Role Description We are looking for a highly experienced Senior PHP Backend Engineer to help build and scale the next generation of MessageGate products. This is a hands-on engineering role focused on designing, developing, and maintaining scalable backend systems, APIs, integrations, and AI-powered platform capabilities. The ideal candidate has a strong foundation in software engineering, architecture, and system design, while also embracing modern AI-assisted development workflows. While the primary focus is backend development, you should be comfortable understanding and contributing across the broader technology stack, including frontend and mobile applications when needed. We are not looking for someone who simply uses AI to generate code. We are looking for an engineer who understands software architecture, scalability, maintainability, and engineering best practices—and uses AI as a productivity multiplier to build better software, faster. What You'll Do Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services and APIs. Build new platform capabilities, integrations, and AI-powered features. Write clean, maintainable, and production-ready code. Participate in architectural decisions and technical solution design. Improve system performance, reliability, security, and scalability. Work closely with product, AI, frontend, mobile, and DevOps teams. Contribute to code reviews, technical discussions, and engineering best practices. Leverage modern AI development tools and agentic workflows to accelerate software delivery. Help evolve our platform as we build the next generation of AI-native products. Required Qualifications 7+ years of professional software development experience. Strong expertise in PHP and Laravel. Deep understanding of software engineering principles, design patterns, and system architecture. Proven experience building and operating production-grade SaaS applications. Strong knowledge of REST APIs, databases, caching, queues, asynchronous processing, and distributed systems. Experience with MySQL and modern backend infrastructure. Strong debugging, troubleshooting, and performance optimization skills. Experience with Docker, Git, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud environments. Ability to balance speed, quality, scalability, and maintainability in engineering decisions. Strong communication skills and a product-oriented mindset. Nice to Have Experience with React.js, Node.js, TypeScript, or modern frontend frameworks. Familiarity with React Native and mobile application development. Experience with Google Cloud Platform. Experience with event-driven architectures, Pub/Sub systems, or messaging platforms. Experience building AI-powered applications, AI agents, RAG systems, MCP integrations, or LLM-based products. Experience using AI development tools such as Cursor, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Windsurf, or similar platforms. What We're Looking For A strong backend engineer first and foremost. Someone who understands how great software is designed, not just coded. Someone who can think about architecture, scalability, and long-term maintainability. Someone who is excited about the future of AI-native software development. A builder who enjoys solving complex technical problems and shipping products that create real business impact. An engineer who knows when to trust AI, when to challenge it, and how to combine engineering experience with modern development tools. Why Join MessageGate? Build products used by leading global brands. Work at the intersection of Messaging, AI Agents, Automation, and Customer Engagement. Be part of a team shaping the future of AI-powered business communication. Freedom to experiment with modern technologies and AI-driven development workflows. Opportunity to make a direct impact on product direction and technical innovation. If you're passionate about software engineering, architecture, and the future of AI-powered development, we'd love to hear from you.
